description_long: This is a modern multi-story research institute building with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The facade features a grid of large, evenly spaced windows framed by dark mullions, providing ample natural light to the interior. A prominent vertical section on one corner is clad in a dark brown material, displaying signage and a logo for 'TAJ 92 Smartlabs'. The building's exterior combines glass, metal, and concrete, with the brown panel adding a distinctive visual accent. The main entrance is located on the front face, marked by a recessed doorway beneath the window grid. The overall design is sleek and functional, typical of contemporary urban research facilities.
description: A modern, multi-story research institute with a glass and metal facade, featuring a prominent brown accent panel and large window grids. The building is sleek, rectangular, and designed for urban environments.
description_view_0: Corner view highlighting the brown accent panel with signage and the grid of windows on two facades.
description_view_1: Frontal view showing the main entrance, full window grid, and the vertical brown accent panel with signage.
description_view_2: Opposite corner view emphasizing the brown accent panel and the stepped roofline.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a mostly solid black facade with minimal windows and no visible signage.
attribute_signage: Signage reads 'TAJ 92 Smartlabs' in white text, located on the upper section of the brown vertical panel at the building's corner. The text is modern and clear, accompanied by a circular logo.
attribute_logo: A white circular logo with geometric elements is present next to the signage on the brown vertical panel, upper corner of the building.
attribute_entryway_design: The main entryway is a recessed rectangular doorway located at the base of the front facade, beneath the window grid. It appears to have a glass door framed in dark metal, with no visible steps, suggesting level access for accessibility. The entry is simple and functional, with no ornate decorations.
